hero.title: Find Your Perfect
hero.description: Connect with professional trainers, instructors, and wellness experts. Book sessions, track progress, and achieve your fitness goals.

findExperts.title: Find Experts
findExperts.description: Browse verified trainers and fitness professionals
findExperts.content: Filter by specialization, location, and ratings to find the perfect match.

directContact.title: Direct Contact
directContact.description: Connect with trainers and arrange details
directContact.content: View full profile, pricing, and availability. Message and book sessions on your terms.

reviews.title: Client Reviews
reviews.description: Make informed decisions with feedback from others
reviews.content: See ratings and read experiences from others to choose the best trainer.

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordRegex: Password must contain: uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (@$!%*?&)
auth.passwordHint: Min 8 chars: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, special char
auth.phoneInvalid: Invalid phone number (9 digits, optionally with +48)
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter the verification code and your new password
auth.passwordResetFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address
auth.verificationFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
auth.resendFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.
auth.resetCodeSent: If an account with that email exists, a code has been sent.
auth.codeSentToEmail: Code was sent to this email address
auth.redirectingToLogin: Redirecting to login page in a moment...
auth.loginFailed: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
auth.chooseRoleDescription: Choose the role that best describes your needs
auth.clientRoleDesc: Find the perfect trainer for you
auth.instructorRoleDesc: Share your knowledge and help others
auth.instructorRegComingSoonDesc: Instructor registration is currently in development. Contact us to join the early access program.
auth.phoneRequiredForInstructor: Required for instructors (clients can contact you)
auth.bioRequired: Bio must be at least 10 characters
auth.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about your experience, specializations and training approach...
auth.specializationsHint: Separate with commas (e.g. Strength Training, Yoga, Stretching)

instructor.manageProfile: Manage your profile, track bookings, and connect with clients
instructor.draftDescription: Your profile is not visible to clients
instructor.publishedDescription: Your profile is live and visible
instructor.bookingsComingSoon: Booking system coming soon! You'll be able to see all your scheduled sessions here.
instructor.reviewsComingSoon: Review system coming soon! Client feedback will appear here.

client.findAndBook: Find and book sessions with the best trainers
client.browseDescription: Discover and connect with professional trainers that match your goals
client.sessionsComingSoon: Booking system coming soon! Your scheduled sessions will appear here.
client.reviewsComingSoon: Review system coming soon! You'll be able to review your past sessions here.
client.messagesComingSoon: Messaging system coming soon! You'll be able to chat with your trainers here.
client.historyDescription: Your past sessions will appear here
client.clearHistoryDescription: Are you sure you want to delete all completed and cancelled bookings? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible.

bookings.title: Booking Settings
bookings.description: Configure the booking system for your clients
bookings.enableBookingsDescription: Allow clients to book sessions directly through the platform
bookings.sessionPriceHint: Price per single session (leave empty if you set individually)
bookings.minNoticeHoursHint: How far in advance must client book a session

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Manage your availability and working hours
availability.weeklyScheduleDescription: Set your standard working hours for each day of the week
availability.exceptionsDescription: Add special dates with custom hours or days off
availability.duplicateExceptionDate: This day already has an exception. Edit the existing one or choose a different day.
availability.pastDateNotAllowed: You cannot add an exception for a past date
availability.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time
availability.calendarDescription: This is how your availability will look to clients when booking
availability.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this exception?

profileForm.title: Edit Your Profile
profileForm.subtitle: Update your instructor profile information
profileForm.specializationSubtitle: What do you specialize in? Select your competencies
profileForm.locationPricingSubtitle: Where do you work and what are your rates?
profileForm.contactMediaSubtitle: How clients can contact you and showcase your work
profileForm.taglinePlaceholder: e.g., Certified Personal Trainer | Strength & Conditioning
profileForm.taglineHint: Short phrase describing who you are (shown under your name)
profileForm.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself, your experience, and your training philosophy...
profileForm.locationHint: Where do you conduct your sessions? (e.g., gym name, area, address)
profileForm.hourlyRateHiddenHint: Instead of rate, will display: "Contact for pricing"
profileForm.packageDealsPlaceholder: e.g., 10-hour package: 1400 PLN (instead of 1500 PLN) - save 100 PLN!
profileForm.packageDealsHint: Describe your package deals (e.g., 10 sessions for the price of 9, monthly pass, etc.)
profileForm.customTagsHint: You can add custom tags not in the list
profileForm.goalsHint: Select goals you help clients achieve
profileForm.additionalSpecializationsHint: Select up to {max} additional areas of expertise

contactSettings.title: Contact Settings
contactSettings.description: Choose which contact information will be visible on your public profile
contactSettings.showPhoneHint: Clients will see your phone number on your profile
contactSettings.noPhone: You don't have a phone number set. Add one in Account Settings.
contactSettings.showEmailHint: Clients will see your email on your profile
contactSettings.messagePlaceholder: e.g., Best contact via WhatsApp or SMS after 6 PM
contactSettings.messageHint: Optional message about your preferred contact method (visible to all visitors to your profile)

paymentSettings.title: Payment Information
paymentSettings.description: Specify which payment methods you accept. This information will be visible to clients.
paymentSettings.additionalInfoPlaceholder: e.g., Payment after session, possibility of bank transfer in advance

profileForm.invalidVideoFormat: Please upload only MP4 or WebM video files
profileForm.invalidImageFormat: Please upload only JPEG, PNG, or WebP image files
profileForm.galleryPlaceholder: Upload photos and videos to showcase your work

Footer.tagline: Connect with the best fitness and wellness trainers in Poland.

InstructorsPage.title: Browse Trainers
InstructorsPage.subtitle: Find your perfect trainer
InstructorsPage.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search in a different city
InstructorsPage.instructorsFailed: Failed to load instructors. Please try again later.

InstructorProfile.previewBanner: This is a preview of how your profile will look when published
InstructorProfile.draftWarning: Your profile is in edit mode and is not visible in the instructor list
InstructorProfile.previewSubtitle: See how your profile will look before publishing

booking.bookingNotEnabledDescription: This instructor is not currently accepting online bookings. Please contact them directly.

InstructorProfile.instructorNotFoundDescription: The instructor profile you're looking for doesn't exist.

Booking.selectDateAndTime: Select a date and time that works for you
Booking.cancellationPolicy: You can cancel free of charge up to {hours} hours before the session.
Booking.cancellationPolicyHint: Free cancellation up to {hours} hours before the session
Booking.bookingNotEnabledDescription: This instructor is not currently accepting online bookings. Please contact them directly.

guestForm.title: Contact Details
guestForm.subtitle: Provide your details so the instructor can contact you
guestForm.name: Full Name
guestForm.phoneInvalid: Invalid phone number (9 digits, optionally with +48)

Booking.bookingCompleted: Booking has been marked as completed
Booking.cancelBookingMessageInstructor: Are you sure you want to cancel this session? The client will be notified of the cancellation.
Booking.cancelBookingMessageClient: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
Booking.cancelBookingWarningInstructor: Canceling the session will notify the client. Keep in mind that frequent cancellations may negatively impact your reputation.
Booking.cancelBookingWarningClient: The instructor will be notified of the cancellation.
Booking.cancellationReasonPlaceholder: E.g., Sudden change of plans, illness...
Booking.bookingSuccessDescription: The instructor has been notified. Wait for confirmation.

rejectModal.title: Reject booking
rejectModal.description: Provide a reason for rejecting this booking. The client will receive a notification with this reason.
rejectModal.reasonPlaceholder: E.g., Not available at this time, schedule conflict...
rejectModal.clientNotification: {clientName} will receive a notification with the rejection reason.

completeModal.title: Complete session
completeModal.description: Are you sure you want to mark this session as completed? This action cannot be undone.

CancelBooking.title: Cancel Session
CancelBooking.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this session? The instructor will be notified.
CancelBooking.reasonPlaceholder: E.g. sudden change of plans, illness...
CancelBooking.successDescription: Your session has been cancelled. The instructor has been notified.
CancelBooking.error: Failed to cancel the session. Please try again later.
CancelBooking.invalidLinkDescription: The cancellation link is invalid or has expired.
